generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-001: Verify DFU initiation for Voyager Free 60+ UC Charge Case (CC) does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Verify firmware update notification is present (or manually trigger check for update via Settings → Firmware Update)
5. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
6. Observe app behavior during the update initiation sequence
7. Wait 10 seconds and check if the app remains responsive
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash, freeze, or become unresponsive when initiating the Charge Case firmware update. The update progress screen appears and the update proceeds normally.

generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash, freeze, or become unresponsive when initiating the Charging Case firmware update. The update progress screen appears and the update proceeds normally.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-003: Verify DFU initiation for CC while media is streaming does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Start playing music or a podcast on the phone (e.g., Spotify, YouTube)
4. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
5. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
6. Observe app behavior during the update initiation
7. Verify media playback state after 10 seconds
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash. The firmware update initiation proceeds. Media playback may pause or continue depending on firmware update requirements, but the app remains stable and responsive.

7. Verify media playback state after 10 seconds
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash. The firmware update initiation proceeds. Media playback may pause or continue depending on firmware update requirements, but the app remains stable and responsive.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-005: Verify DFU initiation for CC after app background/foreground cycle does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
5. Immediately press the Home button to background the app
6. Wait 5 seconds
7. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher or home screen
8. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash upon backgrounding or foregrounding during the CC firmware update initiation. The app returns to the update screen or a stable state without crashing.

8. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash upon backgrounding or foregrounding during the CS firmware update initiation. The app returns to the update screen or a stable state without crashing.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-007: Verify DFU initiation for CC after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
5. While update is initiating, disable Bluetooth on the phone (via Quick Settings)
6. Wait 5 seconds
7. Re-enable Bluetooth on the phone
8. Wait for the earbuds to reconnect automatically
9. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash during Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect while the CC firmware update is initiating. The app handles the state transition gracefully and may show a reconnection or retry prompt without crashing.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-009: Verify DFU initiation for CC with low battery on earbuds does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth with battery level below 15%
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
5. Observe app behavior during the update initiation
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash. The app should display a low battery warning if applicable, but should not crash. The update may be blocked with a user-friendly message, or proceed if battery is sufficient.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-011: Verify rapid sequential DFU initiation (CC then CS) does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
5. Within 2 seconds, also tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charging Case (CS) firmware
6. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash. The app should handle the rapid sequential update requests gracefully, either queuing the second update or showing a message that an update is already in progress, without crashing.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-012: Verify DFU initiation for CC after app force-kill and relaunch does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
5. Immediately force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from Recent Apps)
6. Wait 5 seconds
7. Relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app
8. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
9. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware again
10. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash upon relaunch or upon re-initiating the CC firmware update. The app should recover cleanly and allow the update to be started again.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-013: Verify DFU initiation for CS after app force-kill and relaunch does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
4. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charging Case (CS) firmware
5. Immediately force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from Recent Apps)
6. Wait 5 seconds
7. Relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app
8. Navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
9. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charging Case (CS) firmware again
10. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash upon relaunch or upon re-initiating the CS firmware update. The app should recover cleanly and allow the update to be started again.

generated_testcases.title: TC-DFU-CRASH-014: Verify DFU initiation for CC during an active phone call does not crash app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone
2. Ensure Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds are connected via Bluetooth
3. Initiate or receive a phone call on the earbuds
4. While the call is active, navigate to Device screen → tap [Voyager Free 60+ UC]
5. Tap 'Update' or 'Start Update' for the Charge Case (CC) firmware
6. Observe app behavior
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app does not crash. The app should display a warning that the device is in use and cannot be updated during a call, or gracefully block the update without crashing.
